query: SELECT a.id, a.nome, m.id as midia_id, m.tipo, m.url FROM atletas a LEFT JOIN midias m ON a.id = m.atletaId WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Adílson%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Ailton%' ORDER BY a.nome, m.tipo
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xkKgzjDtwmdn7p.root --database 7XTarzVUuQNAxDd5Eu29wi --execute SELECT a.id, a.nome, m.id as midia_id, m.tipo, m.url FROM atletas a LEFT JOIN midias m ON a.id = m.atletaId WHERE a.nome LIKE '%Adílson%' OR a.nome LIKE '%Ailton%' ORDER BY a.nome, m.tipo
